content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom N:14 and its bonds. Based on my inspection from multiple angles, I can see the following covalent bonds from **N:14**:

**Neighbour atoms of N:14:**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|---|---|
| 13 | C |
| 15 | C |
| 33 | C |

**Summary:**
- **Atom 13 (C)** — bonded to N:14 (to the left)
- **Atom 15 (C)** — bonded to N:14 (upper right, connected towards O:16)
- **Atom 33 (C)** — bonded to N:14 (to the right, leading towards the aromatic ring system with C:35, C:38, etc.)

**geomconf_index: 4409**

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 14, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
